creator: trombik1973@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Hans Petter Selasky from comment #5)

things get clearer. there are several tools to upload firmware.

https://github.com/MarsTechHAN/ch552tool
https://github.com/hexeguitar/CH55x_python_flasher

although i haven't looked at the sources yet, my guess is that, there is no kernel driver for the bootloader. when the bootloader is running, these tools directly talk to it using a protocol.
